mapper.sql: id, name, type, enabled, is_system, priority, config_json, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at
mapper.select: select from t_r_auth_source where name = #{name} limit 1
select from t_r_auth_source order by priority desc, id asc
select from t_r_auth_source where enabled = 1 order by priority desc, id asc
select from t_r_auth_source where enabled = 1 and type = #{type} order by priority desc, id asc
select count(*) from t_r_auth_source where enabled = 1 and type = #{type}
